hero.heading: Bridging the Gap Between Digital Innovation and Strategic Marketing
hero.description: Crafting compelling digital experiences through strategic marketing, creative content, and cutting-edge technology solutions.

about.name: Krisnanda Suaryana
bio: A passionate Digital Marketing Professional and IT Specialist based in Bali, Indonesia. With a unique blend of creative marketing expertise and technical development skills, I bridge the gap between digital innovation and strategic business growth.

My journey spans from crafting viral social media content reaching millions to building full-stack web applications and IT solutions that drive corporate efficiency. I believe technology and creativity are the two pillars of modern business success.

education.description: High School Education — Building the foundation for a career in technology and digital innovation.
Bachelor's Degree (S1) — Focused on Information Technology, software development, and digital systems.

career.description: #1 Electronic Retail in Bali. Spearheading digital content strategy across all major social media platforms.
career.achievement: 700+ viral contents across 8+ social media platforms, driving massive brand awareness and engagement.

career.description: Gold & Precious Metal Jewelry brand. Managing end-to-end visual content production and digital advertising.
career.achievement: Managing Meta Ads campaigns and professional product photography, elevating brand presence in the luxury market.

career.description: Self-employed IT & Agency business. Building innovative IT platforms and digital solutions for corporate clients.
career.achievement: Developed custom IT platforms that improve corporate efficiency and streamline business operations.

career.description: Personal business in the mushroom farm industry, pioneering the integration of technology for sustainable food production.
career.achievement: Integrating IoT and automation technology into agricultural processes for sustainable and scalable farming.
